emergency.label: Notes
emergency.number: 999 covers police, fire, and ambulance. 112 also connects to the same 999 center automatically from any mobile network with coverage.

entryRequirements.visaNote: Many Western nationalities (UK, US, EU, Australia, Canada, etc.) can enter visa-free for 30-180 days depending on nationality. Check current requirements by nationality before travel.

transportInfo.paymentCard: Octopus card (tap-to-pay, works on MTR, buses, trams, ferries, and many shops)
transportInfo.note: Octopus is the single most useful card for a traveler here — buy at the airport or any MTR station.

majorEventsNote: 17 statutory holidays total in 2026; Lunar New Year and Dragon Boat Festival see the heaviest travel demand and price surges.
